---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Member Portal
:::

Use this page to access the private NPE KnowledgeBase without leaving the website.

```{=html}
<style>
.portal-wrap {
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius);
  background: var(--bg-card);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
  overflow: hidden;
}
.portal-head {
  padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.portal-head p {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
.portal-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.portal-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.9rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border: 2px solid var(--navy);
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--navy) !important;
}
.portal-btn:hover { background: var(--tag-bg); }
.portal-frame {
  width: 100%;
  height: calc(100vh - 220px);
  min-height: 720px;
  border: 0;
  background: #fff;
}
.portal-note {
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--text-muted);
}
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .portal-frame {
    height: 78vh;
    min-height: 560px;
  }
}
</style>

<div class="portal-wrap">
  <div class="portal-head">
    <p>Sign in with your approved Google account to continue.</p>
    <div class="portal-actions">
      <a id="portal-open-new" class="portal-btn" href="https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxd9d8YmSf3WCVMMOnQJ_B22KrmU1XkZVKtWp270LE1IofW2IX2147tGGnCku4_vAedig/exec" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open in new tab</a>
      <a class="portal-btn" href="resources.qmd#request-access">Request access</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <iframe
    id="kb-portal-frame"
    class="portal-frame"
    src="https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxd9d8YmSf3WCVMMOnQJ_B22KrmU1XkZVKtWp270LE1IofW2IX2147tGGnCku4_vAedig/exec"
    title="NPE KnowledgeBase Member Portal"
    loading="lazy"
    referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade"
  ></iframe>
</div>

<p class="portal-note">If the portal does not load in-frame on your browser, use <strong>Open in new tab</strong>.</p>
```

::: about-section
[Back to Resources →](resources.qmd){.about-link} [Back to Clinical overview →](index.qmd){.about-link}
:::
